SEARCH
Package dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.config

Class LanguageConfigManager

java.lang.Object
dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.config.LanguageConfigManager
public class LanguageConfigManager extends Object
Manages the Per-Player Multi-Language (i18n) system. Loads YAML files from the locales/ folder and provides messages based on the client's language.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    LanguageConfigManager(org.bukkit.plugin.Plugin plugin)
    Initializes the LanguageConfigManager and loads all available locales.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    getBoolean(org.bukkit.command.CommandSender sender, String path, boolean def)
    Retrieves a boolean value from the locale file safely.
    float
    getFloat(org.bukkit.command.CommandSender sender, String path, float def)
    Retrieves a float value from the locale file safely.
    int
    getInt(org.bukkit.command.CommandSender sender, String path, int def)
    Retrieves an integer value from the locale file safely.
    String
    getRawMessage(org.bukkit.command.CommandSender sender, String path)
    Retrieves the raw string from the correct YAML file, based on the player's client language.
    List<String>
    getRawMessageList(org.bukkit.command.CommandSender sender, String path)
    Retrieves a list of raw strings from the correct YAML file, based on the player's client language.
    void
    loadLocales()
    Loads and updates all language files from the locales/ folder.

  • Constructor Details

    • LanguageConfigManager

      public LanguageConfigManager(org.bukkit.plugin.Plugin plugin)
      Initializes the LanguageConfigManager and loads all available locales.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The main plugin instance.

  • Method Details

    • loadLocales

      public void loadLocales()
      Loads and updates all language files from the locales/ folder. Automatically extracts default languages from the JAR if they do not exist on disk.

    • getRawMessage

      public String getRawMessage(org.bukkit.command.CommandSender sender, String path)
      Retrieves the raw string from the correct YAML file, based on the player's client language.
      Parameters:
      sender - The recipient of the message (Player or Console).
      path - The path to the message inside the YAML file (e.g., "plugin.hello").
      Returns:
      The raw, unformatted string from the language file.

    • getRawMessageList

      public List<String> getRawMessageList(org.bukkit.command.CommandSender sender, String path)
      Retrieves a list of raw strings from the correct YAML file, based on the player's client language.
      Parameters:
      sender - The recipient of the message (Player or Console).
      path - The path to the string list inside the YAML file (e.g., "plugin.help").
      Returns:
      The list of raw, unformatted strings from the language file.

    • getInt

      public int getInt(org.bukkit.command.CommandSender sender, String path, int def)
      Retrieves an integer value from the locale file safely.
      Parameters:
      sender - The target audience to determine the locale.
      path - The YAML key path.
      def - The default value to return if the path is missing or invalid.
      Returns:
      The parsed integer or the default value.

    • getFloat

      public float getFloat(org.bukkit.command.CommandSender sender, String path, float def)
      Retrieves a float value from the locale file safely.
      Parameters:
      sender - The target audience to determine the locale.
      path - The YAML key path.
      def - The default value to return if the path is missing or invalid.
      Returns:
      The parsed float or the default value.

    • getBoolean

      public boolean getBoolean(org.bukkit.command.CommandSender sender, String path, boolean def)
      Retrieves a boolean value from the locale file safely.
      Parameters:
      sender - The target audience to determine the locale.
      path - The YAML key path.
      def - The default value to return if the path is missing or invalid.
      Returns:
      The parsed boolean or the default value.
